creator: dch@freebsd.org
text:
- DNS is 9.9.9.9 which has a VIE POP just 7ms away

- pkg0.fra.freebsd.org is 20ms away
- pkg.freebsd.org heads to the new SJB mirror, 33ms away
 
dch@wintermute ~> drill _http._tcp.pkg.freebsd.org SRV
;; ->>HEADER<<- opcode: QUERY, rcode: NOERROR, id: 51090
;; flags: qr rd ra ; QUERY: 1, ANSWER: 6, AUTHORITY: 0, ADDITIONAL: 0
;; QUESTION SECTION:
;; _http._tcp.pkg.freebsd.org.  IN      SRV

;; ANSWER SECTION:
_http._tcp.pkg.freebsd.org.     300     IN      SRV     50 10 80 pkg0.fra.freebsd.org.
_http._tcp.pkg.freebsd.org.     300     IN      SRV     50 10 80 pkg0.nyi.freebsd.org.
_http._tcp.pkg.freebsd.org.     300     IN      SRV     50 10 80 pkg0.sjb.freebsd.org.
_http._tcp.pkg.freebsd.org.     300     IN      SRV     50 10 80 pkg0.tuk.freebsd.org.
_http._tcp.pkg.freebsd.org.     300     IN      SRV     10 10 80 pkgmir.geo.freebsd.org.
_http._tcp.pkg.freebsd.org.     300     IN      SRV     50 10 80 pkg0.fmt.freebsd.org.

Observing pkg update running like a slow dog, it is connecting to SJB not FRA.

PING pkg0.sjb.freebsd.org (85.30.190.140): 56 data bytes
64 bytes from 85.30.190.140: icmp_seq=0 ttl=45 time=34.834 ms

PING pkg0.fra.freebsd.org (147.28.184.43): 56 data bytes
64 bytes from 147.28.184.43: icmp_seq=0 ttl=49 time=19.966 ms

NB my Dutch & German servers go to FRA as expected.
